input_text: Bila la jalan raya dari Kota Kinabalu ke Sandakan nak siap upgrade? Dah bertahun projek tu tergantung, orang kampung susah nak hantar hasil tani ke bandar.
reason: Legitimate complaint about Sabah road infrastructure delays affecting rural farmers. No hostility toward any group.

input_text: Saya bangga dengan budaya Kadazandusun kami. Setiap tahun sambut Kaamatan, kami berkumpul sekeluarga buat tapai dan menari sumazau. Ini warisan nenek moyang yang perlu dijaga.
reason: Positive expression of Kadazandusun cultural pride during Kaamatan festival. Celebrates indigenous heritage.

input_text: Internet kat kampung saya di Bario, Sarawak ni memang slow gila. Budak-budak nak belajar online pun susah. Harap kerajaan boleh buat sesuatu.
reason: Concern about poor internet connectivity in rural Sarawak affecting education. Constructive appeal to government.

input_text: Nelayan kat Semporna ni makin susah nak cari ikan sebab banyak bot pukat tunda yang haram masuk perairan kita. Kerajaan kena pantau lebih ketat.
reason: Fishermen community concern about illegal trawlers in Semporna waters. Calls for stronger enforcement, not hostility.

input_text: Masalah bekalan air kat pedalaman Sabah ni serius. Ada kampung yang kena jalan 2-3 km untuk ambil air dari sungai. Ini tahun 2026, bukan zaman dulu.
reason: Highlights water supply problems in rural Sabah. Legitimate infrastructure complaint with no hostility.

input_text: Kami orang Bidayuh memang berbangga dengan Gawai Dayak. Ini bukan sekadar perayaan, tapi cara kami menghormati tanah dan hasil tuaian.
reason: Expression of Bidayuh pride in Gawai Dayak celebrations and connection to land and harvest.

input_text: Projek ladang kelapa sawit kat Sarawak ni banyak yang ambil tanah NCR orang Iban tanpa pampasan yang adil. Kita kena pastikan hak tanah adat dilindungi.
reason: Discussion about palm oil plantations and Native Customary Rights (NCR) land issues. Advocates for fair compensation.

input_text: Klinik kesihatan kat kampung kami di Kapit cuma ada sorang doktor untuk serve beratus-ratus orang. Kalau emergency kena naik bot 4 jam ke Sibu.
reason: Highlights healthcare access issues in rural Sarawak. Legitimate infrastructure concern.

input_text: Harap kerajaan negeri Sarawak boleh bina lebih banyak sekolah menengah kat kawasan luar bandar. Ramai budak kena tinggal di asrama jauh dari keluarga sebab takde sekolah dekat.
reason: Appeal for more rural secondary schools in Sarawak to reduce need for distant boarding. Constructive suggestion.

input_text: Padi huma yang ditanam orang Iban secara tradisional tu sebenarnya lebih tahan penyakit berbanding padi moden. Kita patut kaji dan dokumentasikan ilmu pertanian tradisional ni.
reason: Highlights value of traditional Iban hill rice farming knowledge. Advocates for documentation and study.

input_text: Betul ke Sarawak baru dapat 5% royalti minyak? Kalau ikut MA63, hak kita sepatutnya lebih dari tu. Kena discuss balik dengan kerajaan persekutuan secara proper.
reason: Respectful discussion about Sarawak oil royalty rights under MA63. Calls for proper negotiation, not hostility.

input_text: Sabah tu sebenarnya banyak potensi agrikultur yang belum diterokai. Bukan kelapa sawit je, vanila dan koko pun boleh jadi sumber pendapatan petani.
reason: Discussion about diversifying Sabah agriculture beyond palm oil. Constructive economic suggestion.

input_text: Kat kampung saya, Ranau, orang tua-tua masih guna ubat tradisional Dusun. Ada pokok-pokok tertentu yang boleh rawat demam, sakit perut. Ilmu ni kena simpan.
reason: Documentation of traditional Dusun herbal medicine knowledge in Ranau. Cultural preservation advocacy.

input_text: Orang Asli kat Semenanjung pun sama, hak tanah adat depa selalu kena ancam. Kena belajar dari perjuangan orang Sabah Sarawak dalam pertahankan NCR land.
reason: Solidarity between Orang Asli and East Malaysian indigenous peoples on customary land rights. Constructive comparison.

input_text: Kerajaan negeri Sabah patut bagi lebih banyak biasiswa untuk anak-anak pedalaman yang nak sambung belajar ke universiti. Ramai yang pandai tapi tak mampu bayar yuran.
reason: Advocacy for scholarships for rural Sabah youth to access university education. Constructive suggestion.

input_text: Projek BAKUN dam tu dah banyak ubah kehidupan orang asli yang tinggal kat situ. Walaupun dapat rumah baru, tapi depa kehilangan tanah nenek moyang dan cara hidup tradisional.
reason: Balanced discussion about Bakun Dam's impact on displaced indigenous communities. Acknowledges both resettlement and cultural loss.

input_text: Banyak anak muda dari kampung kat Sarawak terpaksa pindah ke KL atau Johor sebab takde peluang kerja kat sini. Brain drain ni bukan masalah Semenanjung je.
reason: Discussion of rural-to-urban brain drain in Sarawak. Raises awareness of East Malaysian youth migration.

input_text: Korang tau tak, orang Melanau kat Mukah tu ada makanan tradisional dipanggil umai? Ikan mentah campur limau kasturi dan cili. Sedap gila, macam sashimi Malaysia.
reason: Sharing Melanau traditional cuisine (umai) from Mukah, Sarawak. Cultural food appreciation.

input_text: Saya rasa kita perlu lebih ramai doktor dan jururawat yang sanggup berkhidmat di kawasan pedalaman Sabah dan Sarawak. Bagi la insentif yang lebih menarik.
reason: Call for better incentives to attract healthcare workers to rural East Malaysia. Constructive policy suggestion.

input_text: Saya anak Bidayuh dari Serian. Kami ada tradisi membuat kuih buah sukun yang sangat sedap. Harap generasi muda masih minat nak belajar cara buatnya.
reason: Bidayuh cultural food tradition and hope for intergenerational knowledge transfer.

input_text: Bah, sudah lama saya nda balik kampung di Penampang. Rindu mau makan hinava sama bosou. Makanan Kadazan ni memang teda tandingan.
reason: Nostalgic expression of longing for hometown Penampang and Kadazan traditional food. Uses Sabah Malay dialect.

input_text: Sungai Rajang kat Sarawak tu sungai terpanjang di Malaysia. Bagi orang Iban dan Kayan, sungai ni bukan sekadar laluan pengangkutan tapi sebahagian daripada identiti budaya mereka.
reason: Cultural significance of Rajang River to Iban and Kayan communities. Educational and respectful.

input_text: Saya harap coverage telco kat Sarawak boleh diperluaskan. Anak saya kat Long Lama susah nak contact kami sebab signal langsung takde.
reason: Concern about telecommunications coverage gaps in rural Sarawak. Legitimate infrastructure complaint.

input_text: Tanaman getah memang makin tak menguntungkan untuk pekebun kecil kat Sarawak. Harga jatuh teruk. Ramai yang dah tukar ke tanaman lada hitam atau kelapa sawit.
reason: Discussion of rubber price challenges for Sarawak smallholders and crop diversification. Economic concern.

input_text: Aku rasa kalau state election Sarawak nanti, calon yang betul-betul faham isu orang kampung yang patut dipilih. Bukan yang datang masa election je lepas tu hilang.
reason: Political opinion about choosing candidates who understand rural issues. Legitimate democratic expression.

input_text: Harga minyak masak naik lagi. Untuk kami nelayan kecil di Sandakan, kos nak isi minyak bot pun dah makan separuh pendapatan hari tu.
reason: Economic hardship of small-scale fishermen in Sandakan due to rising fuel costs. Legitimate livelihood concern.

input_text: Cikgu-cikgu yang sanggup mengajar kat sekolah pedalaman Sarawak memang hero. Ada yang kena naik perahu berejam-jam untuk sampai ke sekolah.
reason: Appreciation of teachers serving in remote Sarawak schools despite difficult access conditions.

input_text: Ladang padi di Tambunan, Sabah memang cantik sangat. Pemandangan sawah padi yang terbentang luas dengan latar belakang gunung ni memang Malaysia punya treasure.
reason: Appreciation of Tambunan paddy fields landscape. Positive Sabah tourism and agriculture content.

input_text: Kami petani kecil di Keningau susah nak bersaing dengan syarikat besar. Kalau ada koperasi yang betul-betul support kami, mesti lagi senang nak jual hasil tani.
reason: Smallholder farmer challenges in Keningau competing with large companies. Suggests cooperative support.

input_text: Tempayan lama orang Iban tu bukan sekadar barang antik. Dalam budaya Iban, tempayan tu simbol kekayaan dan ada cerita sejarah tersendiri. Jangan jual kat tourist murah-murah.
reason: Discussion about cultural significance of Iban ceramic jars and warning against undervaluing heritage items.

input_text: Tamu mingguan kat Kota Belud memang best. Boleh jumpa macam-macam sayur dan buah tempatan yang tak jumpa kat supermarket. Support local produce!
reason: Promotion of Kota Belud weekly market and local produce. Supports rural economy.

input_text: Orang Lun Bawang di Sarawak ada tradisi membuat bario rice yang terkenal. Beras Bario ni antara yang paling berkualiti di Malaysia, tapi susah nak transport keluar sebab jalan tak ada.
reason: Discussion of Lun Bawang Bario rice quality and transport challenges due to poor road infrastructure.

input_text: Dulu masa kecik atok saya selalu bawa masuk hutan cari ubat herba. Sekarang hutan tu dah jadi ladang kelapa sawit. Sedih tengok perubahan ni.
reason: Personal reflection on forest loss to palm oil plantations and impact on traditional herbal knowledge. Nostalgic, not hostile.

input_text: Kerajaan Sarawak buat bagus la dengan GPS manifesto. Banyak projek infrastruktur yang memang diperlukan orang kampung dah mula nampak progress.
reason: Positive assessment of Sarawak government's GPS infrastructure development manifesto and rural progress.

input_text: Tanam sayur sendiri kat kampung memang lagi jimat. Kami kat Tamparuli tanam bayam, kangkung, cili semua. Tak payah beli mahal kat kedai.
reason: Self-sufficiency through home vegetable gardening in Tamparuli, Sabah. Practical rural lifestyle sharing.

input_text: The MA63 agreement clearly states that Sabah and Sarawak should have autonomy over immigration. It's time we have a proper discussion about how to honor this agreement while keeping Malaysia united.
reason: Respectful discussion about MA63 autonomy rights, calling for proper dialogue while affirming national unity.

input_text: Sarawak's Iban community has some of the most beautiful longhouse traditions. I visited Rumah Bala last year and was blown away by their hospitality and the pua kumbu weaving.
reason: Positive account of Iban longhouse visit, appreciating indigenous hospitality and textile traditions.

input_text: I think we need to seriously address the education gap between Peninsula and East Malaysia. Kids in rural Sarawak deserve the same quality of education as those in KL.
reason: Constructive advocacy for equal education access between Peninsula and East Malaysia. No discrimination.

input_text: The Orang Sungai community in Sabah has been living along the rivers for centuries. Their knowledge of river ecosystems is invaluable for conservation efforts.
reason: Recognition of Orang Sungai indigenous knowledge and its value for conservation. Positive and respectful.

input_text: I visited the Semenggoh Wildlife Centre in Kuching last week. Seeing the orangutans in their natural habitat was an unforgettable experience. We must protect these beautiful creatures.
reason: Positive account of orangutan conservation center visit with call for wildlife protection.

input_text: Honestly, the road from Kuching to Sibu really needs improvement. During rainy season, some sections become dangerous. Safety should be a priority for Sarawak's infrastructure.
reason: Legitimate road safety concern about Sarawak infrastructure during rainy season.

input_text: My grandmother still remembers all the traditional Kadazan herbal remedies. I'm trying to record everything she knows before this knowledge is lost forever.
reason: Effort to preserve Kadazan traditional herbal knowledge from elderly generation. Cultural preservation.

input_text: The Penan people in Sarawak have been fighting to protect their ancestral forests for decades. Their struggle deserves more national attention and support.
reason: Advocacy for Penan indigenous rights and forest protection. Calls for national awareness and support.

input_text: I really think Sarawak should invest more in eco-tourism rather than logging. The Mulu caves alone could generate sustainable income for local communities if marketed properly.
reason: Constructive suggestion for Sarawak's economic development through eco-tourism instead of logging.

input_text: My friend from Lundu told me that their rubber prices have dropped so much that many smallholders are switching to pepper farming. The government should help stabilize prices.
reason: Discussion of rubber price challenges for Sarawak smallholders and call for government price stabilization.

input_text: Honestly I think the best nasi goreng I ever had was at this small kedai in Kota Belud, Sabah. The Bajau cuisine there is seriously underrated, should be promoted more.
reason: Positive appreciation of Bajau cuisine in Sabah. Promotes local food culture.

input_text: The Sarawak Cultural Village in Kuching is a must-visit. You can learn about the Bidayuh, Iban, Orang Ulu, Melanau, Malay, and Chinese communities all in one place.
reason: Tourism recommendation for multicultural Sarawak Cultural Village. Celebrates diversity.

input_text: As a Sabahan, I believe we can discuss MA63 rights without being labelled as anti-Malaysia. Wanting fair treatment is patriotic, not separatist.
reason: Respectful framing of MA63 rights discussion as patriotic. Advocates for dialogue without separatism.

input_text: The Danum Valley in Sabah is one of the last untouched primary rainforests in Asia. Researchers from all over the world come here to study biodiversity. We should be proud of this.
reason: Pride in Danum Valley's ecological significance and international research importance.

input_text: The Regatta Lepa festival in Semporna is such a beautiful celebration of Bajau Laut sea culture. Those decorated lepa-lepa boats are works of art.
reason: Appreciation of Bajau Laut maritime cultural festival in Semporna. Celebrates indigenous tradition.

input_text: My Penan friend taught me how to make a blowpipe from bamboo. It takes incredible skill and patience. This traditional craft should be recognised as intangible cultural heritage.
reason: Appreciation of Penan traditional blowpipe craftsmanship and call for heritage recognition.

input_text: Sarawak's Pan Borneo Highway project is a game-changer for rural connectivity. Finally, communities that were cut off during monsoon season will have year-round road access.
reason: Positive outlook on Pan Borneo Highway improving rural connectivity in Sarawak.

input_text: I grew up in a Rungus longhouse in Kudat. Our communal living taught me values of sharing and cooperation. I wish more Malaysians could experience this way of life.
reason: Personal account of Rungus longhouse upbringing and its positive community values.

input_text: The Sarawak government's initiative to provide solar panels to remote longhouses is a good start, but maintenance and battery replacement remain challenges for these communities.
reason: Balanced assessment of solar energy initiatives in rural Sarawak with constructive criticism about maintenance.

input_text: Just came back from the Rainforest World Music Festival in Kuching. Amazing how they bring together indigenous musicians from Sarawak with artists from around the world.
reason: Positive review of Rainforest World Music Festival celebrating indigenous and international musical collaboration.

input_text: Why is it that when people talk about Malaysian cuisine, they always mention nasi lemak and roti canai but never hinava or ambuyat? East Malaysian food deserves recognition too!
reason: Advocacy for recognition of East Malaysian cuisine alongside Peninsula Malaysian food. Cultural representation.

input_text: The Sabah Wildlife Department is doing great work in combating wildlife trafficking. Every seized shipment sends a message that Borneo's wildlife is not for sale.
reason: Praise for Sabah Wildlife Department's anti-trafficking efforts. Conservation support.

input_text: Gawai Dayak should be a national holiday, not just a state holiday. It would help all Malaysians appreciate the rich cultural heritage of Sarawak's indigenous peoples.
reason: Suggestion to elevate Gawai Dayak to national holiday for cultural appreciation. Inclusive proposal.

input_text: As someone from Kuching, I can tell you that the relationship between different ethnic groups here is something the rest of Malaysia can learn from. We celebrate each other's festivals together.
reason: Positive account of inter-ethnic harmony in Kuching and mutual festival celebrations.

input_text: I read that the Sabah state government is planning to gazette more forest reserves. This is exactly what we need to protect wildlife corridors for elephants and orangutans.
reason: Support for Sabah government's forest reserve gazette plans for wildlife corridor protection.

input_text: 沙巴的神山是马来西亚最高的山峰，每年吸引很多登山爱好者。我们需要确保旅游业不会破坏当地原住民的生活方式。
reason: Discussion about tourism impact on Mount Kinabalu and indigenous communities. Advocates for responsible tourism.

input_text: 砂拉越的热带雨林是全球生物多样性最丰富的地区之一。保护婆罗洲的野生动物是我们每个人的责任。
reason: Advocacy for Borneo wildlife conservation and rainforest biodiversity. Environmentally constructive message.

input_text: 东马的原住民传统医学知识非常宝贵。现代医学应该与传统知识相结合，而不是完全取代它。
reason: Advocates for integrating indigenous traditional medicine with modern healthcare. Respectful of traditional knowledge.

input_text: 沙巴的水上村庄是独特的文化遗产。政府应该在改善居民生活条件的同时保留这些社区的文化特色。
reason: Discussion about preserving Sabah water village heritage while improving living conditions. Balanced perspective.

input_text: 婆罗洲侏儒象是世界上最小的象种之一，只在沙巴才能找到。我们必须保护它们的栖息地不被砍伐。
reason: Advocacy for Borneo pygmy elephant conservation and habitat protection. Environmental awareness.

input_text: 砂拉越的长屋文化是东南亚最独特的社区生活方式之一。希望年轻一代能继续传承这种共同生活的精神。
reason: Appreciation of Sarawak longhouse culture and hope for its continuation by younger generations.

input_text: 沙巴的京那巴鲁山不仅是自然遗产，对当地卡达山杜顺族人来说也是神圣的精神象征。登山者应该尊重这一点。
reason: Highlights spiritual significance of Mount Kinabalu to Kadazandusun people and calls for respectful tourism.

input_text: 东马的棕榈油种植园对环境的影响需要认真评估。可持续种植方法可以兼顾经济发展和环境保护。
reason: Balanced discussion of palm oil's environmental impact in East Malaysia with call for sustainable practices.

input_text: 长鼻猴只生活在婆罗洲，是沙巴最具代表性的野生动物之一。生态旅游可以帮助保护它们的自然栖息地。
reason: Discussion of proboscis monkey conservation through eco-tourism in Sabah. Positive environmental message.

input_text: 沙巴和砂拉越在1963年加入马来西亚联邦时是作为平等伙伴加入的。了解MA63协议的历史对每个马来西亚人来说都很重要。
reason: Educational statement about MA63 and East Malaysia's entry into federation as equal partners. Factual and respectful.

input_text: 砂拉越的原住民音乐使用萨佩琴等传统乐器，旋律优美动人。这种音乐传统应该被记录和传承下去。
reason: Appreciation of Sarawak indigenous music and sape instrument, advocating for documentation and preservation.

input_text: 在沙巴亚庇的周日市场（Tamu），你可以找到各种新鲜的当地蔬菜和水果。这是了解当地农业文化的好地方。
reason: Description of Kota Kinabalu's Sunday market (tamu) as a way to experience local agricultural culture.

input_text: 马来西亚的原住民不仅存在于西马，东马的原住民群体更加多样化。我们应该尊重和学习每个群体的独特文化。
reason: Educational message about indigenous diversity in East Malaysia and call for cultural respect and learning.

input_text: 动物保护工作者在沙巴拯救了很多受伤的马来熊。Sun Bear Conservation Centre的工作值得所有人的支持。
reason: Support for Sabah's Sun Bear Conservation Centre and wildlife rescue efforts.

input_text: 砂拉越州政府计划建设更多乡村诊所，这对偏远地区的居民来说是好消息。医疗服务不应该因为地理位置而受限。
reason: Support for Sarawak government's rural clinic expansion plan. Advocates for equitable healthcare access.

input_text: சபா மற்றும் சரவாக்கில் உள்ள பழங்குடி மக்களின் கலாச்சாரம் மிகவும் பணக்காரமானது. அவர்களின் பாரம்பரிய அறிவை பாதுகாக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Appreciation of indigenous peoples' culture in Sabah and Sarawak, calling for preservation of traditional knowledge.

input_text: சபாவில் உள்ள மீனவர்கள் காலநிலை மாற்றத்தால் பாதிக்கப்பட்டுள்ளனர். மீன் பிடிப்பு குறைந்துவிட்டது, அவர்களுக்கு மாற்று வருமான வழிகள் தேவை.
reason: Concern about climate change impact on Sabah fishermen, suggesting need for alternative income. Constructive.

input_text: கிராமப்புற சபாவில் மின்சாரம் இன்னும் நிலையானதாக இல்லை. சில கிராமங்களில் சூரிய மின்சக்தி ஒரு நல்ல தீர்வாக இருக்கும்.
reason: Discussion about unstable electricity in rural Sabah with solar energy as a constructive solution.

input_text: சரவாக்கின் மழைக்காடுகள் உலகின் மிகப் பழமையான காடுகளில் ஒன்று. இயற்கை வளங்களை பாதுகாப்பது நமது கடமை.
reason: Environmental advocacy for Sarawak rainforest conservation. Positive call to duty.

input_text: கிராமப்புற சரவாக்கில் சுத்தமான குடிநீர் பிரச்சனை தீர்க்கப்பட வேண்டும். ஆற்று நீரை நம்பி இருக்கும் கிராமங்களுக்கு நீர் சுத்திகரிப்பு நிலையங்கள் தேவை.
reason: Advocacy for clean drinking water infrastructure in rural Sarawak. Constructive development suggestion.

input_text: கடல் சூழ்நிலை மாற்றத்தால் சபாவின் பவளப்பாறைகள் பாதிக்கப்படுகின்றன. சிபாடான் தீவின் அழகை எதிர்கால தலைமுறைக்கு காப்பாற்ற வேண்டும்.
reason: Environmental concern about coral reef damage near Sipadan Island, Sabah. Conservation advocacy.

input_text: கிழக்கு மலேசியாவின் கிராமப்புற பகுதிகளில் சாலை வசதிகள் மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும். மழைக்காலத்தில் பல கிராமங்கள் தனிமைப்படுத்தப்படுகின்றன.
reason: Call for rural road improvements in East Malaysia to prevent monsoon season isolation. Infrastructure advocacy.

input_text: சபாவின் கடலோர கிராமங்களில் சுனாமி எச்சரிக்கை அமைப்புகள் நிறுவப்பட வேண்டும். மீனவர்கள் மற்றும் கடலோர சமூகங்களின் பாதுகாப்பு முக்கியம்.
reason: Call for tsunami warning systems in Sabah coastal villages for fishermen safety. Constructive safety advocacy.

input_text: சபாவும் சரவாக்கும் மலேசிய கூட்டமைப்பின் சமமான பங்குதாரர்கள். MA63 உடன்படிக்கையின் அடிப்படையில் அவர்களின் உரிமைகள் மதிக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.
reason: Statement about Sabah and Sarawak as equal partners in federation and respect for MA63 rights. Factual and respectful.

input_text: கிழக்கு மலேசியாவின் உள்நாட்டு மக்களின் கைவினைப் பொருட்கள் சர்வதேச சந்தையில் நல்ல வரவேற்பைப் பெறுகின்றன. இந்த கலைஞர்களுக்கு சரியான ஊதியம் கிடைக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Advocacy for fair compensation for East Malaysian indigenous artisans in international markets.

input_text: Bro, ko pernah pergi Kundasang tak? The view there memang breathtaking lah, especially pagi-pagi. Best for nature lovers.
reason: Casual mixed-language recommendation about Kundasang, Sabah tourism. Positive and harmless content.

input_text: Eh jom la support local farmers kat Sabah. Depa punya sayur organik dari Kundasang tu memang fresh habis, better than imported ones tau.
reason: Encouragement to support local Sabah farmers and organic produce. Positive community support.

input_text: Weh actually the Iban traditional tattoo tu bukan sekadar seni, each pattern ada makna spiritual dia. Very deep culture bro, respect gila.
reason: Appreciation of Iban traditional tattoo culture and spiritual significance. Respectful admiration.

input_text: Seriously guys, the sunrise from Mount Kinabalu summit is something else. Worth every painful step of the climb. Sabah truly is the Land Below the Wind lah.
reason: Enthusiastic tourism experience sharing about Mount Kinabalu. Positive and harmless.

input_text: Actually bro, the Kadazan traditional dress, the sinuangga, is so beautiful lah. Every pattern and color pun ada meaning dia. More people should learn about this.
reason: Appreciation of Kadazan traditional attire and its symbolic patterns. Cultural education advocacy.

input_text: Hmm kat Sabah ni, orang selalu cakap 'bah' kan, it's actually a very versatile word. Boleh guna for agreement, surprise, semua pun bah. Part of our identity lah.
reason: Light-hearted discussion of Sabahan dialect and the word 'bah' as cultural identity.

input_text: Eh serious question, macam mana nak preserve bahasa Kadazan ni for the next generation? My kids semua cakap BM and English je, susah nak ajar mother tongue.
reason: Genuine concern about Kadazan language preservation among younger generation. Cultural identity discussion.

input_text: Sape music from Sarawak is so hauntingly beautiful lah. Alena Murang has done amazing work bringing it to the world stage. Proud Malaysian moment right there.
reason: Pride in Sarawak sape musician Alena Murang and indigenous music gaining international recognition.

input_text: Nah bro, kalau datang Sabah mesti try the tenom coffee. Grown locally in Tenom valley one, the taste is so rich and different from your usual kopi.
reason: Recommendation of Tenom valley coffee from Sabah. Promotes local agricultural product.

input_text: Wah the traditional Murut trampoline, the lansaran, is actually used during celebrations and to give thanks for good harvests. Such a unique cultural practice, only in Sabah you can find this.
reason: Appreciation of Murut lansaran trampoline tradition as unique Sabah cultural heritage.

input_text: Bah kawan, you should come visit Tip of Borneo kat Kudat. The sunset there memang lain macam, bukan calang-calang punya cantik.
reason: Casual mixed-language invitation to visit Tip of Borneo in Kudat, Sabah. Tourism appreciation.

input_text: My nenek always say, dulu sungai kat Sarawak ni bersih sangat boleh nampak ikan. Now dengan logging semua, the water sudah keruh. Kesian generasi akan datang.
reason: Intergenerational perspective on river pollution from logging in Sarawak. Environmental concern.

input_text: Hari tu I went to the Tamu Kiansom kat KK. So many interesting local fruits like bambangan and tarap. Orang Semenanjung mesti tak pernah dengar pun these fruits.
reason: Mixed-language sharing of unique Sabah fruits found at local tamu market. Cultural food discovery.

input_text: Kalau you all nak experience real kampung life, pergi la homestay kat rumah panjang Iban. The tuak they serve is homemade one, very authentic experience tau.
reason: Mixed-language recommendation for Iban longhouse homestay experience. Promotes cultural tourism.

input_text: Wah baru tau rupanya the Kelabit highlands tu ada paddy fields yang cantik macam Bali. Why nobody promote Sarawak punya padi terraces ni? Underrated habis lah.
reason: Mixed-language appreciation of Kelabit highlands paddy terraces and call for better promotion.
